import base64, pathlib, subprocess, sys, os, zipfile, shutil
zip_b64 = ''''''
root = pathlib.Path('/content/Mira-clone')
zip_path = pathlib.Path('/content/Mira-clone-posix.zip')
zip_path.write_bytes(base64.b64decode(zip_b64))
shutil.rmtree(root, ignore_errors=True)
root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path) as zf:
    zf.extractall(root)
os.chdir(root)
subprocess.run([sys.executable, '-m', 'pip', 'install', '-q', 'numpy', 'tqdm', 'imageio', 'imageio-ffmpeg', 'matplotlib'], check=True)
import torch
print('torch', torch.__version__, 'cuda', torch.cuda.is_available(), torch.cuda.get_device_name(0) if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'CPU')
subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'scripts/generate_toy_runner_npz.py', '--out', 'data/toy_runner_2k.npz', '--steps', '2000'], check=True)
subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'scripts/train_next_frame.py', '--data', 'data/toy_runner_2k.npz', '--epochs', '1', '--batch-size', '64', '--max-samples', '256'], check=True)
subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'scripts/rollout_preview.py', '--data', 'data/toy_runner_2k.npz', '--checkpoint', 'runs/coinrun_next_frame/best.pt', '--out', 'runs/coinrun_next_frame/rollout.gif', '--steps', '8'], check=True)
from IPython.display import Image, display
display(Image(filename='runs/coinrun_next_frame/rollout.gif'))
